title: Taxi Skradin | Fixed-Price Rides & Transfers | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Skradin for local rides, the Krka National Park boat dock, ACI Marina Skradin, and fixed-price airport transfers. English-speaking driver. Book directly with Antonio.
keywords: taxi skradin, skradin taxi, skradin transfer, skradin airport transfer, taxi skradin krka, aci marina skradin taxi, krka national park taxi

itemOffered.name: Krka National Park boat dock transfers

mainEntity.name: How do I book a taxi in Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call +385 99 447 1013, message on WhatsApp, or send an email. Antonio needs the pickup location, destination, and preferred pickup or arrival time.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: Last-minute requests are accepted within working hours, but a booking needs at least 2 hours notice so the car and pickup time can be confirmed. Booking further ahead guarantees availability.

mainEntity.name: What does "fixed price" mean? What's included?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fixed prices include transportation, fuel, tolls, and help with luggage. No hidden fees. Extra stops or long waits may cost more, communicated upfront.

Yes. Confirming a booking requires a 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros). Rides priced at 20 euros or below require full payment in advance. Advance payments can be made by bank transfer (SEPA) or card, with the remaining balance settled on the day, in cash or by card.

mainEntity.name: Do you accept card payments in the car?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, cards and other contactless payment methods are accepted.

mainEntity.name: Can you take me to the Krka National Park entrance in Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Skradin is the main gateway to Krka. Antonio drops you at the riverfront boat dock where the park boats leave for the Skradinski Buk waterfalls, and picks you up when you are back.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from ACI Marina Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Antonio collects and drops off crews right at ACI Marina Skradin, with room for luggage and provisions. Send the berth number to arrange the meeting point.

mainEntity.name: Do you drive to Šibenik and the airports?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Antonio runs fixed-price transfers from Skradin to Šibenik, Split and Zadar airports, and cities across Dalmatia. For rides starting in Šibenik itself, see the sister service at taxisibenik.hr.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Flight arrivals are monitored in real time and the pickup time is adjusted automatically, at no extra cost.

mainEntity.name: What happens if I need to cancel?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cancellations must be made in writing by email. More than 72 hours before the booking, a full refund applies for bank transfer, or a full refund minus a 10 euro processing fee for card. Cancellations within 72 hours, or no-shows, are non-refundable. Rescheduling is free at any time.

mainEntity.name: Can you accommodate a larger group?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Škoda Superb fits up to 4 passengers. For larger groups, arrangements can be made through local, hand-picked partners.
Yes, child and booster seats are available on request.
